title: Slurry Conversion: A General Method for Formulating Amorphous Solid Dispersions and Fully Integrating Drug and Polymer Components
author: Neusaenger, Amy Lan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is the accepted manuscript version of the work published in its final form as  Neusaenger, A. L., Fatina, C., Shen, Y., Yu, J., & Yu, L. (2025). Slurry conversion: A general method for formulating amorphous solid dispersions and fully integrating drug and polymer components.   Molecular Pharmaceutics, 22  (7), 3976-3986.  https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.molpharmaceut.5c00240 .
